zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bunker於大約1575年出生在英國戴文斯拉普頓時，他的父親Oliver Bunker41歲，母親Joan Chandler27歲。他於1603年2月6日與Elizabeth Wright在英國貝德福爾廷格利特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1623年在英國貝德福爾廷格利特被列為laborer。他去世於從1623年5月10日到1623年5月18日在英國貝德福爾廷格利特，埋葬在英國貝德福爾廷格利特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bunker于大约1575年出生在英国戴文斯拉普頓时，他的父亲Oliver Bunker41岁，母亲Joan Chandler27岁。他于1603年2月6日与Elizabeth Wright在英国貝德福爾廷格利特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1623年在英国貝德福爾廷格利特被列为laborer。他去世于从1623年5月10日到1623年5月18日在英国貝德福爾廷格利特，埋葬在英国貝德福爾廷格利特。

nameMeanings.name: Bunker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname, of Norman origin, for a reliable or good-hearted person, from Old French bon ‘good’ + cuer ‘heart’ (from Latin cor).
History: Bunker Hill in Charlestown, MA, was named as land assigned in 1634 to George Bunker of Charlestown, who had emigrated from Odell in Bedfordshire, England.

variants.name: Banker
meanings: English: from Middle English banker, banc(o)ur, bankquer, bankert ‘covering of tapestry or other fabric for a bench, couch, or chair; ornamental hanging’, possibly a nickname or occupational name for someone who made or sold such things.
English: occupational name possibly from Middle English benker, seemingly ‘maker of benches’ but recorded only in names.
English: perhaps a variant of   Bunker  .

variants.name: Bunkers
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of English   Bunker  .
In some cases possibly also Dutch: perhaps a variant of Benkers, itself a cognate of German Benkert . The surname Bunkers is very rare in the Netherlands.

variants.name: Boenker
meanings: occupational name for a carpenter, a rounded form of   Benker  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Bunker was born about 1575, in Slapton, Devon, England, his father, Oliver Bunker, was 41 and his mother, Joan Chandler, was 27. He married Elizabeth Wright on 6 February 1603, in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1623, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as laborer in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England. He died from 10 May 1623 to 18 May 1623, in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, and was buried in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bunker est né environ 1575, à Slapton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Oliver Bunker, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan Chandler, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wright le 6 février 1603, à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1623, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est laborer à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé du 10 mai 1623 au 18 mai 1623, à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Bunker um 1575 in Slapton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Oliver Bunker 41 und seine Mutter Joan Chandler 27. Er hat am 6. Februar 1603 in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England Elizabeth Wright geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1623, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als laborer in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb von 10. Mai 1623 bis 18. Mai 1623 in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bunker è nato il circa 1575 nel Slapton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Oliver Bunker, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Joan Chandler, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wright il 6 febbraio 1603, nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1623, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come laborer nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England. Morì da 10 maggio 1623 a 18 maggio 1623, nel Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England, e fu sepolto a Tingrith, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bunkerが約1575年にイギリスデボンスラプトンで生まれた時，父Oliver Bunkerは41歳，母Joan Chandlerは27歳であった。1603年2月6日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスでElizabeth Wrightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1623年，49歳の時，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスでの職業はlaborerと記録されている。彼はから1623年5月10日まで1623年5月18日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスで死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアティングリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bunker(이)가 대략 1575년 영국 데폰 슬라프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Oliver Bunker(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Chandler(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1603년 2월 6일 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 Elizabeth Wright(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1623년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 laborer이었다. 그는 1623년 5월 10일부터 1623년 5월 18일까지 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에서 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 틴그리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bunker nasceu aproximadamente 1575, em Slapton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Oliver Bunker, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joan Chandler, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wright em 6 de fevereiro de 1603, em Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1623, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como laborer em Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu de 10 de maio de 1623 a 18 de maio de 1623, em Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bunker родился около 1575 г. в местности слаптон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Oliver Bunker было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Chandler, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wright 6 февраля 1603 г. в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1623 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии laborer в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия. Он умер с 10 мая 1623 по 18 мая 1623 в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности тингрит, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bunker nació aproximadamente 1575, en Slapton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Oliver Bunker, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joan Chandler, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Wright el 6 de febrero de 1603, en Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1623, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era laborer en Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Murió desde 10 de mayo de 1623 hasta 18 de mayo de 1623, en Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Tingrith, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
